statement: 67% of Canadian millennials report having consumed sparkling water in the past 30 days, up from 48% five years ago.
source: Ipsos Canadian Beverage Trends Report 2024
notes: Trend consistent across urban centres; rural adoption lags by ~10 points.

statement: Canadian consumers show 23% higher brand loyalty for domestically-owned beverage brands compared to U.S. imports when quality is perceived as equal.
source: Environics Analytics Canadian Consumer Loyalty Study 2023

statement: TikTok is the primary discovery channel for new beverage brands among Canadian consumers aged 18–24, cited by 58% of respondents.
source: Hootsuite Canadian Social Commerce Report 2024

statement: U.S. Gen Z consumers are 3.2x more likely to purchase a beverage brand after seeing it featured by a micro-influencer (10k–100k followers) than from a traditional ad.
source: Morning Consult Influencer Marketing Impact Report 2024

statement: 73% of Canadian Gen Z sparkling water drinkers say aesthetically distinctive packaging is a top-3 purchase driver for trial.
source: Mintel Canadian RTD Beverage Consumer Report 2024

statement: 55% of Canadian sparkling water consumers aged 18–35 cite 'zero or low sugar' as their #1 purchase criterion, ahead of flavor and brand.
source: Nielsen Canada Health and Wellness Beverage Survey 2024

statement: Clean-label claims ('no artificial sweeteners', 'no preservatives') increase purchase intent by 31% among health-conscious Canadian beverage buyers.
source: Health Canada Consumer Labelling Perception Study 2023
notes: Effect size varies by age; strongest among 27–44 cohort.

statement: Glass bottle packaging increases perceived product quality by 28% among U.S. premium sparkling water buyers versus equivalent plastic or can formats.
source: Circana U.S. Premium Beverage Packaging Study 2023

statement: Convenience store cold-case placement drives 61% of unplanned sparkling water purchases among Canadian consumers aged 20–35.
source: Convenience Industry Council of Canada Shopper Behavior Study 2023

statement: Nostalgia-driven purchase intent for revived 90s Canadian brands is highest among consumers aged 35–52, with 64% reporting they would actively seek out a brand from their childhood if they encountered it.
source: Leger Canadian Brand Nostalgia Report 2023

statement: 46% of U.S. Gen Z sparkling water drinkers have purchased a brand they first saw on TikTok within 48 hours of discovery.
source: eMarketer U.S. Gen Z Social Commerce Trends 2024

statement: Premium sparkling water served at restaurants and hotels drives a 42% higher probability of subsequent retail purchase among consumers who encounter a new brand in that context.
source: Technomic On-Premise Beverage Consumer Study 2023

statement: Distinctive or unusual packaging generates 2.4x more organic social shares among U.S. Gen Z consumers compared to standard packaging at the same price point.
source: Sprout Social Beverage Brand Engagement Report 2024

statement: Price sensitivity for sparkling water peaks at $2.50 CAD for single-serve cans among Canadian convenience channel shoppers, with purchase intent dropping 38% above this threshold.
source: Numerator Canadian Convenience Channel Beverage Study 2024

statement: Subscription or direct-to-consumer delivery for sparkling water has grown 89% YoY in Canada among consumers aged 28–45 who buy premium brands.
source: Canada Post E-commerce Beverage Category Report 2024

statement: Canadian consumers who purchased Clearly Canadian in the 1990s show 71% unaided brand recall when shown the current glass bottle packaging.
source: Clearly Canadian internal brand recall survey 2023

statement: Spring water sourcing claims increase willingness-to-pay by 18% among Canadian health-focused sparkling water buyers versus 'filtered water' equivalents.
source: BevIndustry.ca Premium Water Positioning Study 2023

statement: Existing Clearly Canadian loyalists purchase an average of 3.4 units per grocery visit when the product is available in-store, versus 1.1 units for new trial purchasers.
source: Clearly Canadian internal POS analysis 2023

statement: Eye-level placement in convenience store cold cases increases sparkling water trial by 44% compared to lower shelf positions among impulse buyers.
source: CICC Planogram Effectiveness Study 2022

statement: Canadian origin story messaging ('made with British Columbia spring water') increases premium price acceptance by 22% among both Canadian and U.S. premium buyers.
source: Brand Insight Group Country-of-Origin Premium Study 2023

statement: Canadian Gen Z consumers are 2.1x more likely to purchase a domestic beverage brand over a U.S. brand when the domestic brand is visually prominent on social media.
source: Abacus Data Canadian Youth and Brand Identity Survey 2024

statement: Promotional price stickers on convenience store cooler doors lift unplanned sparkling water purchases by 29% among grab-and-go shoppers.
source: Field Agent Canadian Convenience Store Audit 2023

statement: U.S. sparkling water consumers aged 22–38 spend an average of 6.2 minutes researching a new premium brand online before making a first purchase decision.
source: GWI U.S. Premium Beverage Purchase Journey Study 2024

statement: 62% of Canadian sparkling water loyalists (5+ purchases per year) report purchasing in bulk (4-pack or larger) when promotional multi-pack pricing is available.
source: Numerator Canadian Sparkling Water Basket Study 2023

statement: U.S. premium sparkling water buyers who identify as household 'food and beverage curators' show 34% higher willingness to try new brands at $4–$5 single-serve price points.
source: Circana U.S. Household Food Curator Profile Study 2024

statement: Millennials show higher willingness to support brands with sustainable practices, but price and convenience often remain stronger drivers of purchase decisions.
source: Nielsen Global Sustainability Report 2023

statement: Canadian consumers place increasing importance on recyclable and environmentally friendly packaging, especially among younger demographics.
source: Ipsos Canadian Packaging Attitudes Survey 2023
